prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年物理类最低位次约20151→18473→20005→32193，2025年位次出现大幅后移（较2024年下降约12188名），主要受选科要求调整及专业组划分影响；近4年整体呈后移趋势，2025年基准约32193名；本省物理类计划2022年38人、2023年39人、2024年40人、2025年42人，逐年小幅扩招；2026年计划50人，较2025年扩招约19%，扩招幅度较大，竞争有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2021年第103名持续上升至2026年第63名，近年排名大幅跃升，学校综合实力和认可度显著提升；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要因2025年录取季在河北、河南等地位次下滑超500名，中医学专业在东北省份出现断档；抖音热度排名第103位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光量偏低；中医学、中西医结合、中药学为A+学科（第五轮学科评估），中医学（领军人才培养计划）等王牌专业录取位次极高（2025年约3375名），对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等医学大类社会热度持续偏热/高热推荐；本省2026年普通高考总人数约393700人，较2025年（物理类249802+历史类141436=391238）略有增加，竞争基本持平；学校位于北京，对湖北考生有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次异常后移、2026年大幅扩招约19%、学校软科排名持续上升（从103升至63）吸引更多考生、本省考生总数略有增加等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次将在2025年基准32193名基础上有所回调（扩招效应大于排名上升效应），预测最低位次约34672名，区间34172–35172名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 20151 → 18473 → 20005 → 32193. In 2025, the ranking experienced a significant backward shift (a decrease of about 12188 places compared to 2024), mainly due to adjustments in subject requirements and major group divisions. Over the past 4 years, the overall trend has been a backward shift, with the 2025 baseline at about 32193. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 38 in 2022, 39 in 2023, 40 in 2024, and 42 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion. The 2026 plan is 50, an expansion of about 19% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large increase, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 103rd in 2021 to 63rd in 2026, with a significant leap in recent years, greatly enhancing the school's comprehensive strength and recognition. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to a ranking drop of over 500 places in Hebei, Henan, and other provinces during the 2025 admission season, and a gap in the Chinese Medicine major in northeastern provinces. The Douyin popularity ranking is 103rd, rated as average, with low exposure on short video platforms. Chinese Medicine, Integrated Chinese and Western Medicine, and Chinese Materia Medica are A+ disciplines (fifth round of discipline evaluation). The Chinese Medicine (Leading Talent Training Program) and other flagship majors have extremely high admission rankings (about 3375 in 2025), strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and other medical categories continue to have high social popularity/highly recommended. The total number of candidates for the 2026 provincial college entrance examination is about 393,700, a slight increase from 2025 (Physics Category 249,802 + History Category 141,436 = 391,238), with competition basically flat. The school is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Hubei candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal backward shift in 2025 rankings, the significant expansion of about 19% in 2026, the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings (from 103 to 63) attracting more candidates, and a slight increase in the total number of provincial candidates, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will somewhat recover from the 2025 baseline of 32193 (the expansion effect outweighs the ranking rise effect). The predicted minimum ranking is about 34672, with a range of 34172–35172.

- Chinese Medicine (Excellent 5+3 Integrated Program)
- Chinese Medicine (Qi Huang Class).

- Acupuncture and Tuina
- Bioengineering (Cross Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Nursing
- Chinese Medicine Pharmacy
- Public Administration (Health Management)
- Law (Medicine and Health)
- Big Data Management and Application (Cheng Siwei Top Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 34172–35172, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Chinese Medicine Experimental Class, Chinese Materia Medica Shizhen Class, Acupuncture and Tuina, etc.) as the main choices. Tier 1 flagship majors (Leading Talent Training Program, Hua Tuo Class, etc.) can be used as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors (Nursing, Public Administration, Law, etc.) as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<34172), focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 3731 → 3996 → 4503 → 4070, showing an overall backward trend over the past 4 years, peaking at 4503 in 2024 before slightly recovering to 4070 in 2025; the 2025 baseline is about 4070th place; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 5 students in 2022, 4 in 2023, 4 in 2024, and 5 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 6 students, a 20% increase compared to 2025, representing a relatively large expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the main ranking of Soft Science has continuously risen from 103rd in 2021 to 63rd in 2026, with a significant leap in recent years, greatly enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to a decline in rankings in Hebei, Henan and other regions during the 2025 admission season, and a gap in the Chinese Medicine major in northeastern provinces; Douyin popularity ranking is 103rd, rated as average; Chinese Medicine, Integrated Chinese and Western Medicine, and Chinese Materia Medica are A+ disciplines; the History Category enrollment majors mainly include Acupuncture and Tuina, Law (Medical and Health), English (Medical/International Communication of Chinese Medicine), and Public Administration, which have relatively low correlation with the university's core advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of Law major is divided and wait-and-see; English/Foreign Language majors are generally wait-and-see; Public Administration major popularity is relatively low; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination takers in the province in 2026 is about 393,700, a slight increase compared to 2025; the university is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Hubei candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend of History Category rankings in recent years, the 20% enrollment expansion in 2026, the significant rise in university rankings attracting candidates, and a slight increase in the total number of candidates in the province, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 4070, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 4588, ranging from 4088 to 5088.
